page.title: Dashboard
page.description: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your AI agents.
page.seoDescription: Manage your AI agents and view performance metrics

topAgents.title: Top Performing Agents
topAgents.description: Best agents by resolution rate this month

recentConversations.title: Recent Conversations
recentConversations.emptyDescription: Start chatting with your agents to see conversations here

sentiment.emptyDescription: Analysis will appear as messages are processed

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: You're just a few steps away from having Hay handle your repetitive support tasks so your team can focus on what truly matters — helping customers and growing your business.

progress.title: Onboarding Progress
progress.allCompleted: Congratulations! You've completed all onboarding steps.

integrations.title: Choose integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your favorite tools and platforms to Hay
integrations.description: Hay works where your team already does — plug in apps like {zendesk}, {shopify}, or {whatsapp} in just a few clicks to start syncing conversations automatically.

agent.title: Create an agent
agent.subtitle: Your AI teammate starts here.
agent.description: Define your first Hay agent — give it a name, choose its tone, and decide which channels it should handle.

documents.title: Upload training documents
documents.subtitle: Teach Hay just like you'd train a new team member.
documents.description: Upload your existing playbooks, FAQs, or process docs — Hay learns instantly and never forgets.
documents.locked: Finish the previous steps before doing this. Hay will work better this way.

playbook.title: Create a playbook
playbook.subtitle: Automate common workflows and actions.
playbook.description: Playbooks let you design how Hay should respond, escalate, or perform tasks (like refunds or order lookups) — all without code.
playbook.locked: Finish the previous steps before doing this. Hay will work better this way.

playground.title: Test the agent in a playground chat
playground.subtitle: See your agent in action before going live.
playground.description: Use the built-in playground to test how Hay responds, tweak instructions, and perfect the experience before connecting to real customers.
playground.locked: Finish the previous steps before doing this. Hay will work better this way.
